topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional

questions.hindi: अगर पानी 100 डिग्री तक गर्म होता है, तो वह उबलता है।
questions.english: If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Zero: If + present simple, present simple (general truth) | First: If + present simple, will + base verb (real future possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils."
questions.grammarRule: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional
questions.category: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional practice

questions.hindi: अगर तुम बर्फ को गर्म करते हो, तो वह पिघल जाती है।

questions.hint: Use the pattern: Zero: If + present simple, present simple (general truth) | First: If + present simple, will + base verb (real future possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If you heat ice, it melts."
questions.grammarRule: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional
questions.category: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional practice
